creator: chris@schwer.bewaff.net
text:
I have trouble building evolution. The ports collection and the installed packages are up to date.

gmake[3]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/mail/evolution/work/evolution-2.8.3/e-util'
/bin/sh ../libtool --tag=CC --mode=link cc  -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe  -Wall -Wmissing-prototypes  -Wno-sign-compare  -L/usr/local/lib -o libeutil.la -rpath /usr/local/lib/evolution/2.8   e-util-marshal.lo e-bconf-map.lo e-categories-config.lo e-config.lo e-config-listener.lo e-corba-utils.lo e-cursor.lo e-dialog-utils.lo e-dialog-widgets.lo e-error.lo e-event.lo e-folder-map.lo e-fsutils.lo e-gtk-utils.lo e-gui-utils.lo e-html-utils.lo e-icon-factory.lo e-import.lo e-menu.lo e-mktemp.lo e-plugin.lo e-popup.lo e-print.lo e-profile-event.lo e-request.lo e-signature.lo e-signature-list.lo eggtrayicon.lo e-bit-array.lo e-sorter.lo e-sorter-array.lo e-text-event-processor-emacs-like.lo e-text-event-processor.lo e-util.lo e-xml-utils.lo   -liconv -pthread -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -Wl,--export-dynamic -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/X11R6/lib -lgnomeui-2 -lSM -lICE -lbonoboui-2 -lgnome-keyring -lgnomeprintui-2-2 -lgnomeprint-2-2 -lgnomecanvas-2 -lart_lgpl_2 -ledataserverui-1.2 -
